sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 42:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section II, List of Answers on Terminology 42:1
items.html: That which causes the appearance of a degree is regarded as effecting it. This comes from the term “cause and consequence.” The cause is the reason, and the consequence means that it is extended and born out of that cause and reason.
